embed.description: cobalt lets you save what you love without ads, tracking, paywalls or other nonsense. just paste the link and you're ready to rock!
closing_warning:
cobalt.canine.tools is shutting down on november 1st, 2025.
this instance was hosted for over 2 years and it has been fun.

you can continue to use this until it closes, or read why it's closing below.
